notes:
hỗ trợ = to support, assist, help someone with something. It’s a bit more formal and organized than giúp.

You use it when talking about work, projects, services, money, or technical help.  

It often appears as the noun sự hỗ trợ (the support).  
Close to giúp / trợ giúp, but hỗ trợ sounds more professional or official.
exampleSentences: Anh luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ em khi gặp khó khăn trong công việc.
Chị cần hỗ trợ từ đồng nghiệp để hoàn thành dự án đúng hạn.
Em cảm thấy tự tin hơn nhờ có sự hỗ trợ của gia đình.
notes_md:
**hỗ trợ** = to support, assist, help someone with something. It’s a bit more formal and organized than *giúp*.

You use it when talking about work, projects, services, money, or technical help.  

It often appears as the noun **sự hỗ trợ** (the support).  
Close to **giúp / trợ giúp**, but *hỗ trợ* sounds more professional or official.
exampleSentencesTranslated: You are always ready to support me when I have difficulties at work.
She needs support from colleagues to finish the project on time.
I feel more confident thanks to the support of my family.

example.en: We will support you in this project.
example.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ hỗ trợ bạn trong dự án này.

definitions.vi: Cung cấp sự trợ giúp hoặc hỗ trợ.
